claim_text: The statute of frauds requires certain types of contracts to be in writing to be enforceable.
source_sentence: The statute of frauds requires certain types of contracts to be in writing to be enforceable. These include contracts for the sale of real estate, agreements that cannot be performed within one year, and contracts for the sale of goods over $500.

claim_text: Contracts for the sale of real estate are included in the types of contracts that must be in writing to be enforceable.
source_sentence: The statute of frauds requires certain types of contracts to be in writing to be enforceable. These include contracts for the sale of real estate, agreements that cannot be performed within one year, and contracts for the sale of goods over $500.
reason: Separated because it is a specific instance of the general rule stated in the first sentence.

claim_text: Agreements that cannot be performed within one year are included in the types of contracts that must be in writing to be enforceable.
